data.name: Research Portfolio (This Site)
data.description: This site. A Next.js research portfolio with custom Research and Collaborations sections, canvas-based particle-network background (neural-network aesthetic), Clarity-inspired typographic design (EB Garamond + Inter), Journal/Conference publication filtering, a full writing section with featured-papers sidebar, and expandable publication cards. Built from the socialyadept/devportfolio fork and heavily customised for academic use.

data.name: Agentic AI for Autonomous Equity Research
data.description: MSc dissertation project at Brunel. A fully functional LLM-powered equity research system using a multi-agent pipeline that retrieves live market data, performs fundamental and technical analysis, synthesises structured reports, and self-evaluates factual consistency. A companion benchmark dataset measures hallucination rates, hierarchical reasoning quality, and factual accuracy against analyst-produced ground truth.

data.name: LLM-Powered SIEM (National Deployment)
data.description: First national deployment of an LLM-based SIEM across 200+ federal organisations for Pakistan's NCERT. End-to-end pipeline, Kafka ingestion → LLM-based threat classification (INT8/INT4 quantised inference) → automated alert routing, designed to autonomously process and triage 25M+ logs per day, replacing manual SOC Level 1 analyst operations at national scale.

data.name: Enterprise RAG: Multi-Agent Architecture
data.description: Self-hosted retrieval-augmented generation system using hierarchical multi-agent orchestration and hybrid retrieval (dense + sparse + re-ranking). Improved end-to-end accuracy from 76% (dense-only baseline) to 89% at sub-200ms latency. Built at Neura-X.

data.name: ZazuAI: On-Premise Meeting Intelligence
data.description: Dual-pipeline on-premise speech system. Real-time transcription (Whisper.cpp + DIART, sub-500ms latency) paired with high-accuracy post-processing (WhisperX, 96% transcription / 80% diarisation accuracy). Automated meeting minutes generated via Llama.cpp.

data.name: Thermal Imaging for Industrial Monitoring
data.description: Hybrid ViT + CNN architecture with Spatio-Temporal Graph Neural Networks for sand-level monitoring in industrial separators. Achieved 90-95% accuracy via contrastive learning. Key insight: reduced ViT patch size from 16×16 to 4×4 for effective low-resolution thermal adaptation.

data.name: Intelligent Reconfigurable Surfaces for UAV Communications
data.description: Final year undergraduate research project funded by NESCOM, sole undergraduate recipient of NESCOM Research Funding in the department. Investigated intelligent reconfigurable surfaces for UAV communication links using learning-based beamforming.
